mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, agent_id, disabled, model_setting, model_group, persona_setting, total_tokens, last_processed_chat_id, sound_enabled, last_proactive_greeting_time, create_time, update_time FROM agent_avatar_config WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND agent_id = #{agentId}

SELECT id, user_id, agent_id, disabled, model_setting, model_group, persona_setting, total_tokens, last_processed_chat_id, sound_enabled, last_proactive_greeting_time, create_time, update_time FROM agent_avatar_config WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT id, user_id, agent_id, disabled, model_setting, model_group, persona_setting, total_tokens, last_processed_chat_id, sound_enabled, last_proactive_greeting_time, create_time, update_time FROM agent_avatar_config
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO agent_avatar_config (user_id, agent_id, disabled, model_setting, model_group, persona_setting, total_tokens, last_processed_chat_id, sound_enabled) VALUES (#{userId}, #{agentId}, #{disabled}, #{modelSetting}, #{modelGroup}, #{personaSetting}, COALESCE(#{totalTokens}, 0), COALESCE(#{lastProcessedChatId}, 0), #{soundEnabled})
mapper.update: UPDATE agent_avatar_config SET disabled = #{disabled}, model_setting = #{modelSetting}, model_group = #{modelGroup}, persona_setting = #{personaSetting}, sound_enabled = #{soundEnabled}, update_time = datetime('now', 'localtime') WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND agent_id = #{agentId}

UPDATE agent_avatar_config SET disabled = COALESCE(#{disabled}, disabled), model_setting = COALESCE(#{modelSetting}, model_setting), model_group = COALESCE(#{modelGroup}, model_group), persona_setting = COALESCE(#{personaSetting}, persona_setting), sound_enabled = COALESCE(#{soundEnabled}, sound_enabled), update_time = datetime('now', 'localtime') WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND agent_id = #{agentId}
UPDATE agent_avatar_config SET total_tokens = COALESCE(total_tokens, 0) + #{tokens}, update_time = datetime('now', 'localtime') WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND agent_id = #{agentId}
UPDATE agent_avatar_config SET last_processed_chat_id = #{lastProcessedChatId}, update_time = datetime('now', 'localtime') WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND agent_id = #{agentId}
UPDATE agent_avatar_config SET sound_enabled = #{soundEnabled}, update_time = datetime('now', 'localtime') WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND agent_id = #{agentId}
UPDATE agent_avatar_config SET last_proactive_greeting_time = #{lastProactiveGreetingTime}, update_time = datetime('now', 'localtime') WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND agent_id = #{agentId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM agent_avatar_config WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND agent_id = #{agentId}
